name: Spectrum Analyzer
short_description: Spectrum Analyzer is a precise sound level meter with multichannel harmonic analysis and detailed graphical representation.
detailed_description:
Spectrum Analyzer is a precise sound level meter with multichannel harmonic analysis and detailed graphical representation.
The application requires microphone to function properly.

Spectrum Analyzer Features

  • sound level meter;
  • harmonic analyzer;
  • adjustable graphics;

Sound Level Meter

  • precise acoustic noise measurer.

Harmonic Analyzer

  • multichannel audio frequency analysis;
  • graphical audio frequency representation.

Adjustable Graphics

  • various graphics and diagram types;
  • zoom of selected chart areas.
